name: Sunonwealth Electric Machine Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunonwealth Electric Machine Industry Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells precision motors, mini fans, and thermal modules worldwide. The company offers DC fans and blowers, AC and EC fans, mini fans and blowers, cooling modules, and ventilation fans, as well as fan accessories, such as metal finger guards, plastic guards, metal filter guards, plastic filter guards, and AC cords under the SUNON brand. It serves clients operating in the IT, automobile electronic, optical electronic, and network communication industries. The company was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
